lineItems.description: Program Manager (0.5 FTE) — recruitment, cohort coordination, mentor management, milestone tracking
Program Assistant (0.25 FTE) — administrative support, data entry, participant communications
Participant stipends — 15 participants x 6 milestones x $1,000 per milestone
lineItems.notes: Core program incentive; stipends disbursed upon verified milestone completion

lineItems.description: Mentor stipends — 5 mentors x $1,000 each for 12-month commitment
Curriculum materials and learning resources — subscriptions, textbooks, licenses
lineItems.notes: Udemy, Coursera, or equivalent platform licenses for participants

lineItems.description: Software and tools — Notion workspace, Zoom, collaboration tools
lineItems.notes: Annual subscriptions for program management and virtual sessions

lineItems.description: Participant hardware support — laptop loaner program or subsidies for qualifying participants
lineItems.notes: Up to $200 per participant for those demonstrating financial need

lineItems.description: Recruitment marketing — social media ads, flyers, community outreach materials
lineItems.notes: Targeted outreach to Brooklyn and NYC Black communities

lineItems.description: Administrative overhead — accounting, insurance, legal, office supplies
